title: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 22 November 2024
section_path: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 22 November 2024
section_path_text: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 22 November 2024
summary:
Main
in Weekly Demolition Reports 23/11/2024
This week, the ship recycling markets across South Asia and Türkiye remained subdued, continuing the cautious tone seen in recent weeks. Source: Best Oasis Limited

Linked asset: 2024-11-23_Weekly-Ship-Recycling-Report-16-November-22-November-2024_compressed.pdf
Source asset: reports/hellenic/demolition/pdfs/2024-11-23_Weekly-Ship-Recycling-Report-16-November-22-November-2024_compressed.pdf

[Page 1]
Weekly Ship Recycling Report
16 November - 22 November 2024
Visit : www.best-oasis.com Head Office: 3201, Saba Tower 1, Cluster E, Jumeirah Lake Towers, Dubai, U.A.E
Email: bol@bol.ae Contact: +971 4575 4667

[Page 2]
Highlights of the week
This week, the ship recycling markets across South Asia and Türkiye remained subdued, continuing the cautious tone seen in recent weeks. In India, the
market saw no significant change as both demand and tonnage remained notably low.
